definitions.text: A group, set, or series of ten .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}, particularly:
A period of ten years , particularly such a period beginning with a year ending in 0 and ending with a year ending in 9.
examples: I haven’t seen my cousin in over a decade!

definitions.text: A period of ten days, particularly those in the ancient Egyptian, Coptic, and French Revolutionary calendars.
